items.name: format
items.title: Format helpers
items.description: Price, currency, discount, domain, availability, and image helpers for Channel3 product data.

items.name: variants
items.title: Variant helpers
items.description: Classifies variant option values into display tiers from `exists` and `available`.

items.name: use-latest-request
items.title: useLatestRequest
items.description: Latest-wins guard for overlapping async work: tracks the most recent request and drops stale responses from superseded ones.

items.name: use-in-viewport
items.title: useInViewport
items.description: Fires a callback when an element enters the viewport via IntersectionObserver, with one-shot and repeating modes for lazy sections and infinite-scroll sentinels.

items.name: use-variant-selection
items.title: useVariantSelection
items.description: Manages variant selection and server-side re-resolution via an injected resolver, keeping the API key on your server.

items.name: search
items.title: Search filter helpers
items.description: UI-friendly search filter state, conversion to the SDK SearchFilters payload, option lists, color presets, and hex helpers.

items.name: use-product-recommendations
items.title: useProductRecommendations
items.description: Lazily fetches similar products when the section scrolls into view, via an injected fetcher, so it never blocks the PDP.

items.name: use-async-options
items.title: useAsyncOptions
items.description: Debounced typeahead loader for brand/category suggestions, delegating to an injected server-side fetcher.

items.name: use-infinite-scroll
items.title: useInfiniteScroll
items.description: Headless infinite-scroll pagination over a token-paged list: seeds an initial page, appends subsequent pages via an injected fetcher, and exposes a sentinel ref.

items.name: use-product-search
items.title: useProductSearch
items.description: Query + filter state, debounced auto-search, and infinite-scroll pagination via an injected search fetcher.

items.name: price-range-gauge
items.title: Price Range Gauge
items.description: Plots the current price against its historical range as low/typical/high zones with a tick at the current price.

items.name: price-history-chart
items.title: Price History Chart
items.description: Area chart of a product's price over time, built on the shadcn chart wrapper.

items.name: product-card
items.title: Product Card
items.description: Borderless, image-forward product tile with hover image-swap and color swatches, for grids and carousels. Includes a loading skeleton.

items.name: offers-list
items.title: Offers List
items.description: Compares merchant offers for a product, cheapest first, with affiliate-tracked buy links.

items.name: image-gallery
items.title: Image Gallery
items.description: Product image carousel with a synced thumbnail strip.

items.name: variant-selector
items.title: Variant Selector
items.description: Renders every variant dimension as pills or swatches with three tiers of emphasis (purchasable, out-of-stock, not-offered).

items.name: product-attributes
items.title: Product Attributes
items.description: Renders a product's extracted attributes (structured_attributes plus materials, gender, and age) as a two-column definition list.

items.name: product-grid
items.title: Product Grid
items.description: Responsive grid of product cards with loading skeletons and an empty state.

items.name: product-carousel
items.title: Product Carousel
items.description: Horizontally scrollable row of product cards with nav controls (e.g. "More like this").

items.name: product-details
items.title: Product Details (PDP)
items.description: Compound product detail page: gallery, header (all brands), variant selection, offers, price history, description, attributes, and an optional 'you might also like' carousel. Pairs with useVariantSelection.

items.name: product-recommendations
items.title: Product Recommendations
items.description: Lazy "you might also like" carousel for a PDP: defers the findSimilar fetch until it scrolls into view and hides itself when empty.

items.name: search-bar
items.title: Search Bar
items.description: Controlled search input with submit-on-Enter, a clear button, and an optional image-search trigger.

items.name: product-filters
items.title: Product Filters
items.description: Compound, configurable filter panel (stacked sidebar or horizontal popover bar): price, gender, age, condition, availability, hex color palette with opt-in percentages, brand and category typeahead, and category-scoped attribute filters.

items.name: product-search
items.title: Product Search
items.description: Batteries-included search experience: search bar, configurable filters, and an infinite-scroll results grid wired to useProductSearch.

items.name: all
items.title: Channel3 — everything
items.description: Installs the full Channel3 UI kit: every component, hook, and lib in the registry.
